title: 3-PACK Squeaky Dog Toys, Cute Tough Plush Toys, Durable Stuffed Puppy Toys to Keep Them Busy, Cuddly Soft Stuffed Dog Chew Toys Bundle for Medium Small Puppy Dogs
features: 3-Pack Plush Dog Toys: This adorable set includes three colourful monster-themed plush toys, each with its own quirky shape and fluffy character. Perfect for dogs of all sizes who love soft, playful companions.
Built-in Squeaker : Every toy features a built-in squeaker that delivers an exciting squeak with every bite, stimulating your dog’s natural play instincts and keeping them entertained for hours.
Soft & Safe Material: Made with ultra-soft, skin-friendly plush fabric and embroidered eyes for added safety. Perfect for cuddling, gentle chewing and everyday play.
Machine Washable: Designed to be lightweight and easy for dogs to carry around. When play gets messy, simply pop the toys in the washing machine to keep them fresh and clean.

Perfect For Indoor Play: Whether tossing, fetching or snuggling, these monster plush toys bring joy and comfort. An ideal value pack for multi-pet homes or as a fun enrichment gift for your furry friend.
